title: callitris robusta
intro: Callitris robusta, also known as the Buloke or Buloke Pine, is a species of coniferous tree native to southern Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Callitris robusta include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Callitris robusta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues.
